import sys
from bisect import bisect_left

input_data = sys.stdin.buffer.read().split()
idx = 0

t = int(input_data[idx]); idx += 1
for _ in range(t):
    n, m, k = int(input_data[idx]), int(input_data[idx+1]), int(input_data[idx+2]); idx += 3
    xs = set()
    x_list = []
    for i in range(n):
        v = int(input_data[idx]); idx += 1
        xs.add(v)
        x_list.append(v)
    ys = set()
    y_list = []
    for i in range(m):
        v = int(input_data[idx]); idx += 1
        ys.add(v)
        y_list.append(v)
    
    vert_count = {}
    horiz_count = {}
    
    for p in range(k):
        xp, yp = int(input_data[idx]), int(input_data[idx+1]); idx += 2
        on_v = xp in xs
        on_h = yp in ys
        if on_v and not on_h:
            vert_count[xp] = vert_count.get(xp, 0) + 1
        elif on_h and not on_v:
            horiz_count[yp] = horiz_count.get(yp, 0) + 1
    
    tv = sum(vert_count.values())
    th = sum(horiz_count.values())
    ans = tv*(tv-1)//2 - sum(v*(v-1)//2 for v in vert_count.values())
    ans += th*(th-1)//2 - sum(v*(v-1)//2 for v in horiz_count.values())
    print(ans)
